home.description: A comprehensive guide to the legendary ninja world — history, characters, hidden villages, and mysterious eye techniques from the masterpiece of Masashi Kishimoto.
home.quote: I will never give up! That is my ninja way!

author.title: Author History
author.description: Explore the life and career of Masashi Kishimoto — the creator of the legendary ninja world.

villages.title: Village History
villages.description: From Konohagakure to Amegakure, each ninja village has its own formation history and secrets.

characters.title: Character Encyclopedia
characters.description: Detailed profiles of key characters — from Naruto to Madara, from heroes to villains.

dojutsu.title: Legendary Eye Techniques
dojutsu.description: A collection of clan Dojutsu — Sharingan, Byakugan, Rinnegan and other mysterious eyes.

villages.title: Village History
villages.description: Explore the founding history, culture, and legendary ninjas of each village in the world of Naruto Shippuden.

characters.title: Character Encyclopedia
characters.description: Detailed profiles of key characters in Naruto Shippuden — from heroes to villains, from masters to students.

characterDetail.exploreMore: Explore more characters in the world of Naruto.

dojutsu.title: Legendary Eye Techniques
dojutsu.description: Dojutsu — special eyes — are the most powerful Kekkei Genkai in the ninja world. Each type carries unique power and a distinct clan history.
